title: Fgentic matrix-a2a-bridge agent routing map
description: Version 1 of the fail-closed ghost routing, sender policy, and remote trust-pin configuration.

schemaVersion.description: Configuration schema major version. Omission is accepted temporarily as deprecated v1 input.

stage.description: Rollout stage. `dev` agents are invocable only in the bridge's configured staging rooms; `prod` (the default) is unrestricted. Valid for both local and remote targets.

dataClassification.description: Highest-sensitivity room data delegated to this mapping. Omission fails closed to regulated. The bridge sends this only to its authenticated local agentgateway admission boundary, never to a remote target.

agentContractSHA256.description: Effective local kagent Agent spec plus imported prompt-fragment digest. The bridge combines it with the full normalized live mapping to derive the content-free agent_version audit field; remote mappings have no repository-owned Agent contract.

extensions.description: Additional A2A extension URIs to activate on a remote delegation, beyond the always-on token-budget contract. Also the allowlist of required card extensions the bridge accepts.

maxCost.description: Highest per-skill credit-unit price the bridge will pay this remote. When set, the verified card must advertise a skill quote within it or the delegation fails closed (quote_over_budget). Credit-units are bilateral accounting units, not currency.

allowMedia.description: Opt this remote mapping into moving file bytes across the org boundary in either direction (#115). Omitted or false keeps the boundary closed to files: inbound room files are refused and the remote's artifact bytes are withheld. Remote targets only; local media is governed solely by the global MIME/size policy.

mtls.description: A2A v1.0 mutual-TLS client-certificate material presented to this remote endpoint (#244). Paths reference files projected from a SOPS-managed Secret; never inline PEM. Remote targets only. A verified card that declares an mTLS security scheme without this fails closed.

serverCAFile.description: Optional PEM bundle pinning the roots that verify the partner's server certificate; omitted defers to the system trust store.

allowedRooms.description: Exact managed rooms in which this ghost may be invoked. Entries are room IDs or local bootstrap aliases; an omitted or empty set denies invocation everywhere.
